subject: feat(import): show progress bar while embedding model loads for fuzzy grouping
body:
Instead of silently falling back to exact grouping when the model isn't
cached, Step 2 now always waits for the embedding model with a progress
bar. First import downloads ~22MB (shows download %); subsequent imports
load from browser cache in ~1-2 seconds.

- useEmbeddings: expose modelProgress ref and waitForModel() promise helper
- ImportStepClassify: preparingGroups loading state with animated progress bar
- Graceful fallback: if model fails to load, proceeds with exact grouping

Tags: import, ml, ux, embeddings
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: auto-tagging-imports
Semver: minor
